subject: [PATCH v5 10/18] mm: preserve RWP marker across PTE rewrites

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch ensures that the RWP (Read-Only Write-Protection) marker is preserved across PTE rewrites in various kernel paths, including swap, device-exclusive, migration, fork, and mprotect operations. Without this preservation, the RWP tracking could be silently dropped, leading to unexpected behavior when accessing pages with PAGE_NONE semantics. The patch adds checks and modifications to maintain the uffd bit (RWP marker) across these operations, ensuring that it is not lost during PTE rewrites.
